title: vandenboschia martinezii
intro: Vandenboschia martinezii, also known as the Mexican tuckahoe, is a type of fern that belongs to the family Hymenophyllaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Vandenboschia martinezii include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and exhibit antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used to make teas or infusions, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
